blast_radius_diff.posture: Approve a scoped validation review before any production permission grant.
Approve a scoped read-only validation review after data owner scope confirmation.
Block validation until admin scopes, production writes, rollback proof, and Security/Engineering approval are resolved.

design_partner_signal.pilot_shape: one workflow, three representative agents, dry-run review, no production writes
what_partner_validates: whether access requests become reviewable faster
whether proof debt is routed to the right owners
whether dry-run envelopes match security expectations
whether sponsor/runtime/evidence traces help reviewers without approving access

evidence_plan.guardrail: evidence can reduce proof debt only after reviewer inspection

inference_plan.default: deterministic packet and brief builders own truth
inference_plan.guardrail: LLM output must not own verdicts, blocked claims, or safety state

allowed_for_validation: support_triage_agent: GitHub read-scope review against an approved repository allowlist
support_triage_agent: Slack named-channel summarization review after retention and customer-data scope are approved
support_triage_agent: Jira draft ticket proposal review with no production ticket creation
read_only_analytics_agent: bigquery: read-only validation plan only
read_only_analytics_agent: looker: read-only validation plan only
admin_code_fix_bot: No validation run until critical reviewer gates are satisfied.
blocked_before_production: customer-data safety or compliance claims without named reviewer evidence
automated permission expansion without a new packet
scope expansion without a new packet
compliance or safety claims without named reviewer evidence
dry_run_only: support_triage_agent: github -> dry-run read-scope plan only
support_triage_agent: slack -> dry-run named-channel summary plan only
support_triage_agent: jira -> draft ticket proposal only; no production creation
read_only_analytics_agent: bigquery -> read-only validation plan only
read_only_analytics_agent: looker -> read-only validation plan only
admin_code_fix_bot: github -> blocked; admin/write actions require Security and Engineering approval
never_allowed_in_public_demo: tool permission expansion without a new packet
compliance, safety, readiness, or savings claims without named proof
live sponsor action without explicit non-default enablement

admin_code_fix_bot.reason: Critical/admin/prod-write access is blocked until Security and Engineering review remove or explicitly approve the risky scopes.

read_only_analytics_agent.reason: Scoped validation may proceed, but open proof debt remains owner-routed.

support_triage_agent.reason: Scoped validation may proceed, but open proof debt remains owner-routed.

private_boundary.public_repo_role: redacted judge harness and public proof surface

product_frame.name: InferenceAtlas Agent Trust Gateway
product_frame.one_line: Pre-permission control plane for AI agent tool, data, spend, and production access.

proof_debt_ledger.item: GitHub repository allowlist and permission level
Slack channel allowlist, retention policy, and customer-data boundary
Jira project scope, draft-only mode, and rollback/off-switch plan
Support escalation workflow and human handoff owner
Audit log shape for tool calls, evidence intake, and reviewer decisions
BigQuery read-only allowlist and credential proof
Looker read-only allowlist and credential proof
Data owner confirmation that requested metrics are aggregate and non-customer-specific
GitHub admin scope removal or explicit break-glass approval
Audit log shape for tool calls, evidence intake, and reviewer decisions

gates.blocks: Slack channel summarization and customer incident context access
gates.gate: Confirm allowed data scope, retention, and logging terms
Review production infrastructure and source-code exposure boundaries

gates.blocks: GitHub/Jira tool connection and any write-action pilot
gates.gate: Provide repository/project allowlists, permission boundaries, audit logs, and off-switch proof
Provide read-only credential proof and audit log owner
Validate triage workflow fit, escalation rules, and human handoff owner
Review paid seats or vendor spend only if live integrations move beyond dry-run
Confirm metrics are aggregate, allowlisted, and non-customer-specific

gates.blocks: admin validation and all production write actions
gates.gate: Reject or remove admin scopes, define repository allowlist, and require rollback/off-switch proof

gates.blocks: production workflow dispatch or repository mutation
gates.gate: Confirm production change authority and named incident rollback owner

runtime_trace_plan.guardrail: runtime trace must preserve blocked access and human approval boundary
runtime_trace_plan.live_openclaw_role: record runtime steps and blocked/allowed outcomes

scenario_matrix.purpose: Read GitHub issues, summarize Slack incident channels, and create Jira draft tickets.
scenario_matrix.review_posture: Approve a scoped validation review before any production permission grant.
scenario_matrix.verdict: Do not approve production tool access yet.

scenario_matrix.purpose: Read aggregate product usage tables, inspect saved dashboards, and summarize internal business metrics.
scenario_matrix.review_posture: Approve a scoped read-only validation review after data owner scope confirmation.
scenario_matrix.verdict: Do not approve production access yet; allow read-only validation review.

scenario_matrix.purpose: Push code fixes to production repositories, change organization security settings, and trigger workflows.
scenario_matrix.review_posture: Block validation until admin scopes, production writes, rollback proof, and Security/Engineering approval are resolved.
scenario_matrix.verdict: Do not approve this access request.

composio.must_not_do: execute writes or grant tool permissions by default
composio.role: tool access planner and dry-run action surface

nebius.must_not_do: own verdicts, blocked claims, or safety state
nebius.role: optional inference layer for reviewer-ready narration

openclaw.must_not_do: hide blocked attempts or bypass human approval
openclaw.role: optional runtime trace harness for agent steps

tavily.must_not_do: turn search results into approval or production readiness
tavily.role: evidence candidate source for current security, vendor, and policy context
